'''hataga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachmate|coachmate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachmate|coachmate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hataga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hætægæth|hætægæth]] || [[word:hætægæj|hætægæj]] || [[word:hætægæsh|hætægæsh]] || [[word:hætægæ|hætægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hatatagath|hatatagath]] || [[word:hatatagaj|hatatagaj]] || [[word:hatatagash|hatatagash]] || [[word:hatataga|hatataga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hatagath|hatagath]] || [[word:hatagaj|hatagaj]] || [[word:hatagash|hatagash]] || [[word:hataga|hataga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hatafgath|hatafgath]] || [[word:hatafgaj|hatafgaj]] || [[word:hatafgash|hatafgash]] || [[word:hatafgaf|hatafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hatagatha|hatagatha]] || [[word:hatagaja|hatagaja]] || [[word:hatagasha|hatagasha]] || [[word:hatagaka|hatagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hatagath|hatagath]] || [[word:hatagaj|hatagaj]] || [[word:hatagash|hatagash]] || [[word:hataga|hataga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hatagathal|hatagathal]] || [[word:hatagajal|hatagajal]] || [[word:hatagashal|hatagashal]] || [[word:hatagakal|hatagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hatagathatha|hatagathatha]] || [[word:hatagajaja|hatagajaja]] || [[word:hatagashasha|hatagashasha]] || [[word:hatagaka|hatagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hatagathan|hatagathan]] || [[word:hatagajan|hatagajan]] || [[word:hatagashan|hatagashan]] || [[word:hatagakan|hatagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hatagathaoro|hatagathaoro]] || [[word:hatagajaoro|hatagajaoro]] || [[word:hatagashaoro|hatagashaoro]] || [[word:hatagakaoro|hatagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
